sglang.title: use sglang_per_token_group_quant_fp8 from sgl-kernel instead of trion kernel
sglang.author: strgrb
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This pr implemented a faster kernel for per_token_group_quant_fp8, which can replace triton kernel. #4817
I tested the kernel with 2048x7168 fp8 quant:

and benchmark DeepSeek-R1 on 8*H20, about 5% throughput increase
Modifications

Column-major scale is constructed as input of cuda kern

vllm.title: [Doc] Updated Llama section in tool calling docs to have llama 3.2 config info
vllm.author: jmho
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The current tool calling docs for the Llama models notes that only the Llama 3.1 models are supported for JSON based tool calling even though there is support for the Llama 3.2 models as well.
This PR removes a mention of a chat template that no longer exists, adds the llama 3.2 models under support

vllm.author: fyabc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adding support for Qwen2.5-Omni model (thinker only).
Requirements
This PR requires this corresponding transformers PR.
pip install git+https://github.com/huggingface/transformers@f742a644ca32e65758c3adb36225aef1731bd2a8

Note: You need to install transformers from source from that branch
